metadata.name: Unfazed #10
metadata.description:
Interpreting the moment of self-control that can occur individually or massively, where interruptions that arise might come from internal and external influences. This piece was inspired by the human struggle to maintain the balance between their mind and reality that often felt harsh to compare.

The idea of "a powerful stance of commitment" was taken as the main narrative for the visual representation idea. The visual illustrates the robustness of commitment to maintaining the change within itself.
______________________________________________________________

///INTERACTIVITY///
Read the instructions below and do it after opening the live mode.

1. Press the "c" button on your computer keyboard to save a frame from your minted iteration.

2. To save a 3-second & 60 fps .GIF file, press the "s" button on your computer keyboard. Please be patient while waiting for the piece to save and render its frames.

3. To adjust the piece resolution, you need to set your browser first and then reload the browser every time you want to capture the screen or save the rendered .GIF file.
______________________________________________________________

Created using Hydra and p5.js

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2023
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Ecstatic Glitched Worms #8
metadata.description:
The contained worms create glitches anomalies that cause ecstatic sensation to its surrounding.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: The Imaginary River Of Thoughts #42
metadata.description:
This work was inspired by the analogy of the mind that is similar to a river. Where all thoughts flow endlessly following the current within an imaginary landscape.

The visual representation of this work came from a personal reflection on human perspectives in measuring a decision within their everyday lives.

Press ’s’ on the live mode to save the screen capture.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Murked Beast #4
metadata.description:
“Some say that they’re the cause of our ancestor disappearances. They bring chaos, looking at us as prey and spreading the tainted murked energy into our realm. They're Infecting us into what we have become today. Some say that they’re gone already. But we believe that they will come back to feast on us once again and again.”

This artwork was the continuation of the piece titled “Murked Being”. It also stands as another attempt to develop the aesthetic style for “Murked Being” universe lore creation.

Move your mouse up and down to rotate the eyes, nose, and the animation on its face.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Ancient Murked Heritage #3
metadata.description:
“It is a heritage, left by the ancestor far before the realm became murked. Until today, many went to the portal and never came back.”

This artwork was the continuation of the piece titled “Murked Being”. It also stands as another attempt to develop the aesthetic style for “Murked Being” universe lore creation.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Pulsating Noise Fragments #20
metadata.description:
This piece was a result of experimenting with pixelated modulation to create fragments of pulsating noise visual patterns in black and white color.

Press ’s’ on the live mode to save the screen capture.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Centered #9
metadata.description:
Various animated patterns were moving, flickering, pulsating, and directed to the center of the screen.

Press ’s’ on the live mode to save the screen capture.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Unstable Space #73
metadata.description:
The piece interprets the imaginary senses of an unstable space, where various disruptions might happen within its existence.

Inspired by the human tendency to need a private safe space but instead always faces a contradiction with reality. All are accumulated and abstracted into moving visual representations.
______________________________________________________________

///INTERACTIVITY///
Read the instructions below and do it after opening the live mode.

1. Press the "c" button on your computer keyboard to save a frame from your minted iteration.

2. To save a 3-second & 30 fps .GIF file, press the "s" button on your computer keyboard. Please be patient while waiting for the piece to save and render its frames.

3. The animated visual will always behave following the screen's resolution (e.g. the visual on 1:1 view and the live mode will show differently, but still give the same impression of the minted iteration). To adjust the piece resolution, you need to set your browser first and then reload the browser every time you want to capture the screen or save the rendered .GIFs file.
______________________________________________________________

Created using Hydra and p5.js

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2023
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Miasmic #7
metadata.description:
The visual representation shows the animated movement of some dark-saturated colors and texture, which might give the sense of an eerie or another surreal atmosphere. An imaginary toxic landscape engulfed in darkness within the digital realm.

Press ’s’ on the live mode to save the screen capture.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Proport #9
metadata.description:
The title of this piece was a diminution state of the possible words between proportion and disproportion.

Inspired by the contradiction of reality and expectation, this piece was an experiment on the possible in-between situation where both "proportion" and "disproportion" that could be presented.
______________________________________________________________

///INTERACTIVITY///
Read the instructions below and do it after opening the live mode.

1. Press the "c" button on your computer keyboard to save a frame from your minted iteration.

2. To save a 2-second & 60 fps .GIF file, press the "s" button on your computer keyboard. Please be patient while waiting for the piece to save and render its frames.

3. To adjust the piece resolution, you need to set your browser first and then reload the browser every time you want to capture the screen or save the rendered .GIF file.
______________________________________________________________

Feel free to enjoy the animation.

Created using Hydra and p5.js

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2023
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Red Dot Black Dot #6
metadata.description: The tension between circles

metadata.name: Op Art Generator I #2
metadata.description:
Your own Op Art generator, each piece is unique.

This is a tribute to one of our favourite art movements and its pioneers like the incredible Bridget Riley.

metadata.name: Unsolicited abstraction of modern times #138
metadata.description:
This piece is an abstraction and a reflection on the last era, on all that we have built and become. Are we proud of it or has it just been the result of iterating through the days? Since the technology boom, we have experienced great improvements, but perhaps also massive ...mistakes?  

Inspired by textbooks of the 80s, with elements that remind us of industry, technology, networks and systems, "Unsolicited abstraction of modern times" invites us to question our work to date. Has everything really changed?

unknowable 2022




Usage:
press [s] - save pixels (png)
press [p] - save vectors (svg)

License:
Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-ND 4.0)
